title: Robin Protects the Tontatta
description: Pages 6–10 focus on robin protects the tontatta, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Sabo, Unknown person #6 as usopp, Robin, and the Tontatta reach the heart of the plan to make Sugar faint and restore Dressrosa's forgotten victims.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Up until now, it's been a diff- Feren't class of fighting fish alto- Gether!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Did you see it charge just now!? They can even reach the fighters in the ring.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: They're need- lessly cruel and ill-tem-pered, with no regard for the rules!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We've taken the boss class fish from each school!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: And on the back of one of them ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: rests the prize of this tournament, the "mera Mera No mi"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The rules are simple!! The champ'll be the one who steals it away...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...and manages to be the last one standing in the ring!!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: Dongukote Family Elite Officer (hero of Corrida Colosseum):

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: At long last, the final match begins!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: Along with our hero, Diamante, we've got a five-person battle Royale!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: A rumble for the devil fruit!! A death match complete with intruding fighting fish!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Who will the Mera Mera no mi go to!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Here's...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...the gong!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Alright, we're here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: That's the entrance to the Palace!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Sneak sneak

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Not yet. This is the lower entrance to the Palace's ramparts.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: We mustn't be spotted by the gate guards....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: There's also a secret entrance here! Come on!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: If we attract attention and any officers get wind, we're going to be stopped in our tracks!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: especially PICA! If he shows up, we'll never make it to DoFlamin- go!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Hmm? Where's luffy- Dono...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Umm... Uhhh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Gomu Gomu No...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Who's this card!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: GIGANTO ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: What's with this carp!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Is he a puffer- fish!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: ...pistoll,!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: gyah!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: What's He Gone and Done!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: The way's clear!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: We can see that!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: W-Well, what's done is done. Let's go!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: At this point, the fastest way will be through the front!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: We can take this off now, yeah?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Do as you like!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Now, now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: ...!? That's.

summary: Robin Protects the Tontatta focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Sabo as usopp, Robin, and the Tontatta reach the heart of the plan to make Sugar faint and restore Dressrosa's forgotten victims.
